description_long: This object is a vintage console television encased in a large, ornate wooden cabinet with a dark reddish-brown finish. The front features a prominent convex glass screen, flanked by decorative wooden panels and a control section with rotary dials and a metallic label. Below the screen are two brass-handled drawers, and the base includes a wide shelf supported by four sturdy, carved legs. The sides and back are solid wood with raised panel detailing, giving the unit a heavy, furniture-like appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century home entertainment centers, combining both electronic and storage functions.
description: A vintage console television in a dark wood cabinet with brass handles, decorative panels, and a convex glass screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the convex screen, control dials, brass-handled drawers, and ornate wooden detailing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, paneled wooden construction with no visible controls or screen.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view with a large convex screen and horizontal vent-like slats, lacking visible controls or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid wood paneling.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, dark wood bezel with ornate carved details and metallic accents
attribute_control_button_layout: cluster of rotary dials and buttons on the right front panel
